prompt: Create a vertical mixed-media digital collage poster in a Y2K cyber-grunge and streetwear aesthetic. The background is a textured, grainy white paper. In the center stands a young man wearing a loose plaid shirt, oversized wide leg baggy jeans, air Jordan 1s, and a trucker hat, with one hand in their pocket. His face is slightly positioned to the left. Behind him is a large, bold red halftone cross graphic. Add vibrant red airbrush spray paint streaks to the top right and bottom left corners. On the left side of the figure, include a vertical block of ASCII art and computer code. Near the figure's legs, place a holographic sticker and a rectangular barcode sticker. In the bottom right corner, include a rough black ink line-art sketch of an anime-style character alongside small distressed text. Scatter small minimalist stars, hearts, and black cyber-sigilism tribal lines throughout the background. The overall vibe should be edgy, distressed, and reminiscent of a 2000s digital scrapbook.
